name: Baumer Holding AG
lede: Baumer runs two centers across two Indian cities. Pune and Vapi, covering manufacturing, built over eighteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Baumer office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Baumer Holding AG GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Baumer runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Pune, Vapi), covering manufacturing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Baumer's India footprint covers Pune and Vapi, spanning manufacturing. The centers deliver R&D and ER&D, Sales & Marketing and Customer Support for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all eight decision-makers, in one profile.
